theme_notes: Touchstones: Trump-Xi Beijing summit (Xi warns of 'conflict' over Taiwan, Iran on the table); US-Iran war day 73+ (Senate blocked war powers vote a 7th time); Russia mass drone/missile strike on Kyiv (31 injured, 6 districts hit); OKC Thunder sweep Lakers 8-0 in playoffs (SGA dominant); Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair.
settled: You're square. Unlike the US-China Taiwan situation.
Zero balance. Rarer than a quiet night in Kyiv.
All settled. The Senate has voted on harder things seven times already.
youOwe: Under $50. The Thunder took the Lakers for more than this.
Pocket change. Smaller than Trump's Beijing hotel tip.
Barely a debt. More like a diplomatic gesture.
This is what Iran ceasefire talks cost per hour. Roughly.
SGA scored more than this in Game 4. Just saying.
Under $200. Smaller than Trump's tab at the Beijing state dinner.
Kevin Warsh just got the Fed job. He'd classify this as a 'managed risk.'
The IMF moved to the adverse scenario. Your partner moved to the couch.
At the Trump-Xi summit, nobody claimed credit. Same energy as your payment history.
Russia called it a 'special operation.' Call this a 'special circumstance.'
The Cavaliers came back from 15 down in overtime. You can't find $800.
Trump flew to Beijing to fix things. You won't open the Venmo app.
The Senate blocked war powers 7 times. Your partner asked once. Still nothing.
OKC went 8-0 in the playoffs without flinching. You've broken every promise.
This debt has outlasted the Iran peace talks, two ceasefires, and your excuses.
Xi warned of 'conflict.' He meant Taiwan. Your partner means this.
Day 73 of the Iran war. Your debt is older. That's embarrassing.
The IMF has entered the adverse scenario. So has your relationship.
theyOwe: They owe you almost nothing. The Lebanon ceasefire held longer than their word.
Cute little balance. Less dramatic than the Met Gala, barely.
Under $50. Not worth a war powers vote, but you're considering it.
They owe you more than an apology and less than a NATO contingency plan.
The Thunder swept the Lakers in four games. You've been waiting longer.
Small but noted. The UN Security Council has seen worse claims.
Enough to rebuild a street in Kyiv. Your partner could rebuild trust instead.
Kevin Warsh is managing the entire U.S. economy. You can't get $300.
The BRICS ministers had less tension than your last dinner conversation.
Trump got Xi to pledge no military aid to Iran. Can you get a Venmo pledge?
Four figures. The IMF is officially 'monitoring the situation.'
The Cavaliers erased a 15-point deficit in OT. Your partner can't erase $800.
The Senate voted 7 times. You've sent 12 reminders. Neither worked.
SGA swept the Lakers. Your partner swept this debt under the rug.
The IMF upgraded to 'adverse.' Your therapist upgraded it to 'concerning.'
Xi and Trump are less indebted to each other. Think about what that means.
They owe you more goodwill than Russia owes Kyiv. Kyiv at least got sympathy.
Even the IMF's adverse scenario has an exit strategy. You don't.
